Anita Tsai 蔡靚萱
About Experience Expertise Works

商業報導｜趨勢拆解｜CEO 教育內容Business reporting | Trend translation | CEO learning products

蔡靚萱 Anita TsaiAnita Tsai / Ching-Hsuan Tsai

資深商業媒體人與知識產品製作人Business writer and knowledge-product producer

把複雜趨勢，拆解成企業能理解、能行動的知識。Turning complex business trends into clear, actionable knowledge.

觀看作品View Works 查看經歷View Experience LinkedIn

About / 關於 Anita

把趨勢翻成決策語言Translating trends into decision language

Anita Tsai（蔡靚萱）擁有 22 年新聞工作經驗，從《聯合報》、《財訊雜誌》到《商業周刊》，長期採訪金融、科技、社會趨勢與生技醫療。Anita Tsai has 22 years of journalism experience, beginning at United Daily News, later working at Wealth Magazine, and then joining Business Weekly in March 2013.

她曾任《商業周刊》主筆，並在商周 CEO 學院與商周共學圈負責 CEO50、轉型研究室、百大顧問直播等課程與知識產品，把深度報導能力延伸到企業學習場景。She has covered finance, technology, social trends, and biotech, and later extended her reporting craft into CEO learning products including CEO50, Transformation Lab, and executive community programming.

從深度採訪到 CEO 課程製作，Anita 擅長把快速變動的產業訊號整理成可討論、可學習、可決策的框架。Across reporting, interviews, and executive learning, Anita translates fast-moving industry signals into frameworks that business audiences can discuss, learn from, and act on.

Experience / 經歷

從新聞室到 CEO 學習場景From newsroom reporting to CEO learning products

April 2016 - August 2024

商業周刊主筆Lead Writer

商周集團 Business Weekly Group

負責金融、科技、生技等產業採訪與新興趨勢專題報導；曾擔任科技、金融與數位轉譯團隊召集人。Covered finance, technology, and biotech industries, with a focus on emerging mega-trends; previously led technology, finance, and digital translation teams in the newsroom.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export

January 2023 - August 2024

商周共學圈「轉型研究室」課程統籌、製作人Coordinator of Online Video Case-Study Course

商周集團 Business Weekly Group

負責線上影音個案教學課程的案例編輯、理論框架確認、腳本、教材、拍攝溝通、使用數據追蹤與體驗優化。Produced 15-minute online case-study courses, including case editing, framework validation, scripts, course materials, video coordination, usage-data review, and UX optimization.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export

September 2022 - March 2023

商周 CEO 學院數位領導力課程製作人Coordinator of Digital Leadership Course

商周集團 Business Weekly Group

設計 CEO 學員的數位轉型課程，包含講師聯繫、課程主持、招生協助、教材編輯與活動企劃。Designed digital transformation courses for CEO students, including lecturer coordination, course hosting, enrollment support, material editing, and event planning.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export

January 2021 - August 2022

數位產品製作人Digital Product Producer

商周集團 Business Weekly Group

製作 CEO50 實體課程、百大顧問直播節目、圓桌論壇、武漢戰情室電子報，並擔任 CEO 與 EMBA 社群主理人。Produced CEO50 in-person courses, Top 100 Consultant livestreams, roundtables, a paid CEO e-newsletter, and community programming for CEO and EMBA audiences.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export

March 2013 - April 2016

資深記者Senior Reporter

商周集團 Business Weekly Group

加入《商業周刊》擔任商業記者，後續進入主筆與團隊召集角色。Joined Business Weekly as a business reporter before moving into lead-writer and team-lead roles.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export and English bio

June 2005 - March 2013

科技組撰述委員Senior Reporter

財訊雜誌 Wealth Magazine

採訪半導體、面板、生技與金融，並負責專題與封面故事報導。Reported on semiconductors, displays, biotech, and finance, including feature and cover-story assignments.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export and English bio

September 2002 - May 2005

經濟組記者Reporter

聯合報 United Daily News

從《聯合報》開始記者生涯，採訪半導體、面板、生技與金融等領域。Began her journalism career at United Daily News, covering semiconductors, displays, biotech, and finance.

Source: LinkedIn PDF export and English bio

Expertise / 採訪領域

跨科技、金融、社會與醫療的長線觀察Long-form observation across technology, finance, society, and healthcare

科技Technology

從硬體、平台、聲控到太空商機，追蹤技術如何改變產業結構。From hardware and platforms to voice interfaces and space business, Anita tracks how technology reshapes industries.

VR、區塊鏈與元宇宙VR, Blockchain & Metaverse

觀察新興技術從概念、資本熱潮到商業化落地的過程。Reports on emerging technologies as they move from concepts and capital cycles toward commercial adoption.

社會趨勢Social Trends

以消費、工作、生活型態與人口變化切入，拆解商業社會的新需求。Explores shifts in consumption, work, lifestyles, and demographics, and what they mean for business.

金融與總經Finance & Macroeconomics

從金融市場、地緣政治到資本流動，建立讀者理解風險與機會的脈絡。Frames financial markets, geopolitics, and capital flows so readers can better understand risks and opportunities.

生技醫療Biotech & Healthcare

報導藥品安全、抗癌治療、醫療科技與生技投資，兼顧科學、產業與制度。Covers drug safety, cancer treatment, medical technology, and biotech investing across science, industry, and regulation.

Featured Works / 得意作品

已驗證作品Verified works

只有能回溯標題、作者與外部頁面的作品會顯示連結。Links appear only when title, authorship, and external source have been verified.

商業周刊 Business Weekly · Issue 1493

抗癌大未來The Future of Cancer Treatment

波士頓現場生技封面故事，商周線上讀頁面列出〈抗癌大未來〉及相關系列文章，作者包含蔡靚萱。A Business Weekly biotech cover package from Boston. The Business Weekly archive lists Anita Tsai as writer for the package and related articles.

查看作品Read article

Verified via Business Weekly issue archive, issue 1493, published 2016-06-23.

Interviews / 重要訪談對象

跨科技、創業、金融與生醫的全球觀察Global perspective across technology, entrepreneurship, finance, and biomedicine

以下名單依英文 Bio 建立；呈現重點是專業觀察範圍，而非名人堆疊。The list is sourced from the English bio and framed as a map of Anita's reporting range.

Sir James DysonMikael HedTravis KalanickYuri MilnerWill.I.amNicholas WoodmanPeter GrauerPhillip A. SharpCraig VenterRobert S. LangerNoubar Afeyan

Contact / 聯絡

保持專業、保留邊界Professional contact, with privacy intact

本網站暫不公開私人 email 或電話。可先透過 LinkedIn 或公開作者頁補充。Private email and phone are intentionally omitted. LinkedIn or public author pages can be added here.
